plugin.name: Continue
plugin.description: Interactive PDA Reports is an add-on for S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Anomaly that enhances immersion by transforming the static reporting system into a dynamic radio network. Instead of receiving dry, disconnected notifications, your character now automatically broadcasts radio reports whenever they loot a body, just like other stalkers in the Zone. This mod makes quest updates, discoveries, and death reports feel like authentic, dynamic communications that are seamlessly integrated into the world of the Zone.

plugin.name: Spanish
plugin.description: Instala el mod con textos en Español. Recomendado si tu juego está en español.

plugin.name: English
plugin.description: Install the mod with English text files. Recommended if your game is in English.

plugin.name: Russian
plugin.description: Установить мод с русскими текстовыми файлами (Бета). Рекомендуется, если ваша игра на русском языке.

plugin.name: All Languages
plugin.description: Installs all supported languages (English, Spanish, and Russian). The mod will automatically use your game's language. Recommended if you switch game languages or are unsure which to pick.

plugin.name: View Changelog
plugin.description:
NEW FEATURES: - Dynamic PDA Locations with landmark descriptions. - Bilingual cardinal points (English/Spanish). - Russian Language Support (Beta). - Vengeance System for enemy AI. - Developer Debug Mode.
BUG FIXES: - AI behavioral fix for allies. - Radio broadcast fix for mutants. - Russian encoding fix (Windows-1251). - Standardized versioning system.
